name: California Fig Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover the figs with hot water, let stand for 10 minutes. Drain and reserve for liquid.
2. Snip the stems off the figs, then chop coarsely.
3. Sift the flour; measure it out.
4. Add baking powder, salt, and cinnamon to the sifted flour and mix together.
5. Incorporate oats, chopped figs, and nut meats into the mixture.
6. Cream the shortening until smooth.
7. Gradually add brown sugar, creaming them thoroughly.
8. Beat in the eggs one at a time.
9. Alternately add the sifted dry ingredients with water to form dough.
10. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto a greased cookie sheet.
11. Bake at 400°F for 10 minutes.
